title: podman push : requires exactly 2 arguments
body:
podman-push(1) implies that a 1-argument push should work (as it does with docker). But:
```
# podman pull busybox
# podman tag busybox localhost.localdomain:5000/push_ok:tag_ok
# podman push --tls-verify=false localhost.localdomain:5000/push_ok:tag_ok                                                         
podman push requires exactly 2 arguments
# podman push --tls-verify=false busybox !$
...works
```
